Interface ICookingMasteryRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
CookingMasteryRepository
public interface ICookingMasteryRepository
Contract for cooking mastery persistence operations. All methods return CompletableFuture to ensure database access never blocks the main server thread.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<List<CookingMasteryModel>>
    findAllForPlayer(UUID playerUuid)
    Retrieves all mastery records for a player.
    CompletableFuture<Optional<CookingMasteryModel>>
    findEntry(UUID playerUuid, String recipeId)
    Finds the mastery record for a specific player and recipe.
    CompletableFuture<Integer>
    incrementCount(UUID playerUuid, String recipeId)
    Increments the cook count for a player and recipe by one, creating a new record if none exists, and returns the new count.

  • Method Details

    • findEntry

      CompletableFuture<Optional<CookingMasteryModel>> findEntry(UUID playerUuid, String recipeId)
      Finds the mastery record for a specific player and recipe.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player's UUID
      recipeId - the recipe identifier
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the entry if it exists

    • findAllForPlayer

      CompletableFuture<List<CookingMasteryModel>> findAllForPlayer(UUID playerUuid)
      Retrieves all mastery records for a player.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing all mastery records for this player

    • incrementCount

      CompletableFuture<Integer> incrementCount(UUID playerUuid, String recipeId)
      Increments the cook count for a player and recipe by one, creating a new record if none exists, and returns the new count.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player's UUID
      recipeId - the recipe identifier
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the new cook count after the increment
